# BRIEF

## User-Facing Goal

Give users an easy way to remove images they no longer want in a project.

## Success Criteria

- Each uploaded image card has a visible delete action.
- Clicking delete removes the image from the project.
- The stored file is cleaned up too.

## UX Notes

- Keep the delete affordance small but discoverable.
- Avoid making the image card feel cluttered.

## Risks Or Tradeoffs

- Destructive image actions should still feel deliberate, even if we keep the interaction lightweight.
